detail.description: Daniel Susac singles on a fly ball to right fielder Michael Conforto. Casey Schmitt scores.
Daniel Susac doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Bryce Eldridge to 3rd.
Daniel Susac singles on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Daniel Susac singles on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Bryce Eldridge to 3rd. Matt Chapman to 2nd.
Daniel Susac singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Rafael Devers scores. Matt Chapman scores.
Daniel Susac triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Adolis García. Heliot Ramos scores. Casey Schmitt scores.
Daniel Susac singles on a ground ball to right fielder Adolis García.
Daniel Susac singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford. Jerar Encarnacion to 2nd.
Daniel Susac singles on a ground ball to center fielder Luis Robert Jr.
Daniel Susac singles on a ground ball to left fielder Juan Soto. Matt Chapman to 2nd.

Daniel Susac singles on a line drive to right fielder Sal Frelick.
Daniel Susac singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jake Bauers, deflected by shortstop David Hamilton. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd.
Daniel Susac singles on a ground ball to right fielder Sal Frelick. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd.
